description: ir_typer.rs:1774-1864 — specialize_return is #[allow(dead_code)] and tagged as a tier-up hook for fz-ul4.19.5, which is not scheduled. The function duplicates type_fn's block-env propagation logic with its own widen-at-K cap. Dead code that shares a problem with live code but not the implementation is a drift risk: when type_fn changes, specialize_return silently diverges. Remove the 90-line function entirely. When fz-ul4.19.5 lands it will be rebuilt from the real type_fn, not from a stale copy.
title: remove dead specialize_return function
